zh.Constantinople,Istanbul,Turkey: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev於1053年5月26日出生在烏克蘭Київ時，他的父親Vsevolod I Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Kiev23歲，母親Princess Maria Manomacha of Byzantine22歲。他於1076年之前與Gytha Haraldsdottir of Wessex, Grand Princess Consort of Kievan Rus在烏克蘭Київ結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1094年在Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиїв被列為prince。他去世於1125年5月19日在Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиїв享年71歲，埋葬在Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиїв。

zh-hans.Constantinople,Istanbul,Turkey: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev于1053年5月26日出生在乌克兰Київ时，他的父亲Vsevolod I Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Kiev23岁，母亲Princess Maria Manomacha of Byzantine22岁。他于1076年之前与Gytha Haraldsdottir of Wessex, Grand Princess Consort of Kievan Rus在乌克兰Київ结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1094年在Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиїв被列为prince。他去世于1125年5月19日在Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиїв享年71岁，埋葬在Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиїв。

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev was born on 26 May 1053, in Kyiv, Ukraine, his father, Vsevolod I Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Kiev, was 23 and his mother, Princess Maria Manomacha of Byzantine, was 22. He married Gytha Haraldsdottir of Wessex, Grand Princess Consort of Kievan Rus before 1076, in Kyiv, Ukraine. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. In 1094, his occupation is listed as prince in Kyiv, Kiev Uyezd, Kiev, Russian Empire. He died on 19 May 1125, in Kyiv, Kiev Uyezd, Kiev, Russian Empire, at the age of 71, and was buried in Kyiv, Kiev Uyezd, Kiev, Russian Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev est né le 26 mai 1053, à Kyiv, Ukraine, son père, Vsevolod I Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Kiev, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Princess Maria Manomacha of Byzantine, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Gytha Haraldsdottir of Wessex, Grand Princess Consort of Kievan Rus avant 1076, à Kyiv, Ukraine. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. En 1094, sa profession de son indiquée est prince à Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Empire russe. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1125, à Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Empire russe, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Empire russe.

de.lifeSummary: Als Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev am 26. Mai 1053 in Kyiv, Ukraine geboren wurde, war sein Vater Vsevolod I Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Kiev 23 und seine Mutter Princess Maria Manomacha of Byzantine 22. Er hat vor 1076 in Kyiv, Ukraine Gytha Haraldsdottir of Wessex, Grand Princess Consort of Kievan Rus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1094 ist sein Beruf als prince in Kiew, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich aufgeführt. Er starb am 19. Mai 1125 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Kiew, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich und wurde in Kiew, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev è nato il il 26 maggio 1053 nel Kyiv, Ucraina, il suo padre, Vsevolod I Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Kiev, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Princess Maria Manomacha of Byzantine, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Gytha Haraldsdottir of Wessex, Grand Princess Consort of Kievan Rus prima del 1076, nel Kyiv, Ucraina. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1094, la sua occupazione è indicata come prince nel Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich. Morì il 19 maggio 1125, nel Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich.

ja.Constantinople,Istanbul,Turkey: トルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブル
ja.lifeSummary: Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kievが1053年5月26日にウクライナКиївで生まれた時，父Vsevolod I Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Kievは23歳，母Princess Maria Manomacha of Byzantineは22歳であった。1076年以前にウクライナКиївでGytha Haraldsdottir of Wessex, Grand Princess Consort of Kievan Rusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1094年，Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиївでの職業はprinceと記録されている。彼は1125年5月19日にРоссийская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиївで71歳で死去し，Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиївにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev(이)가 1053년 5월 26일 우크라이나 Київ에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Vsevolod I Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Kiev(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess Maria Manomacha of Byzantine(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1076년 이전 우크라이나 Київ에서 Gytha Haraldsdottir of Wessex, Grand Princess Consort of Kievan Rus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1094년, 그의 직업은 Российская империя Киевская губерния Киевский уезд Київ에서 prince이었다. 그는 1125년 5월 19일 Российская империя Киевская губерния Киевский уезд Київ에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 Российская империя Киевская губерния Киевский уезд Київ에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev nasceu em 26 de maio de 1053, em Kyiv, Ucrânia, seu pai, Vsevolod I Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Kiev, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Princess Maria Manomacha of Byzantine, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Gytha Haraldsdottir of Wessex, Grand Princess Consort of Kievan Rus antes 1076, em Kyiv, Ucrânia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1094, sua profissão aparece como prince em Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1125, em Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev родился 26 мая 1053 г. в местности Киев, Украина, его отцу по имени Vsevolod I Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Kiev было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Princess Maria Manomacha of Byzantine, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Gytha Haraldsdottir of Wessex, Grand Princess Consort of Kievan Rus перед 1076 г. в местности Киев, Украина. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1094 году он работал по профессии prince в местности Киев, Киевский уезд, Киевская губерния, Российская империя. Он умер 19 мая 1125 г. в местности Киев, Киевский уезд, Киевская губерния, Российская империя в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности Киев, Киевский уезд, Киевская губерния, Российская империя.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev nació el 26 de mayo de 1053, en Kyiv, Ucrania, su papá, Vsevolod I Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Kiev, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Princess Maria Manomacha of Byzantine, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Gytha Haraldsdottir of Wessex, Grand Princess Consort of Kievan Rus antes de 1076, en Kyiv, Ucrania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1094, su ocupación registrada era prince en Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1125, en Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich.
